items.title: The Golden Scale: Bling Libra and the Evolving Extortion Economy
items.author: Matt Brady
items.content: Scattered Lapsus$ Hunters: Organizations, be aware of the effort of this cybercriminal alliance as they target retail and hospitality for extortion.

When AI Remembers Too Much – Persistent Behaviors in Agents’ Memory
items.author: Jay Chen and Royce Lu
items.content: Indirect prompt injection can poison long-term AI agent memory, allowing injected instructions to persist and potentially exfiltrate conversation history.
